name: Supervisor Core V1 Lean
description: Primary error monitoring workflow. Error Trigger → Enrich & Classify (with absorbed self-loop detection, normalized fingerprinting, credential sanitization, trigger-node fallback, novelty markers, fingerprint short label, self-loop throttle) → Debounce with burst counting → Atomic circuit breaker with 15-minute rolling decay, embedded transition logging, and decay countdown support → Unified alert with circuit-open banner, probable cause, severity-adapted formatting, compact HTML links, novelty prefix, fingerprint label, decay countdown → Parallel DB logging independent of Telegram delivery → Auto-retry with exponential backoff, retryOf guard, NEVER_RETRY denylist, retry receipt logging with failure visibility.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO supervisor_events (trace_id, event_type, workflow_name, execution_id, failed_node, severity, status, fingerprint, payload)
VALUES (
  ($1::jsonb)->>'traceId',
  'error_self_loop',
  ($1::jsonb)->>'workflowName',
  ($1::jsonb)->>'executionId',
  ($1::jsonb)->>'failedNode',
  'warning',
  'suppressed',
  ($1::jsonb)->>'fingerprint',
  jsonb_build_object('reason', 'self_loop_detected', 'category', ($1::jsonb)->>'category', 'executionMode', ($1::jsonb)->>'executionMode', 'selfLoopThrottled', ($1::jsonb)->>'selfLoopThrottled')
)

options.queryReplacement: ={{ JSON.stringify({ traceId: $json.traceId, workflowName: $json.workflowName, executionId: $json.executionId, failedNode: $json.failedNode, fingerprint: $json.fingerprint, category: $json.category, executionMode: $json.executionMode, selfLoopThrottled: String($json.selfLoopThrottled) }) }}

  ($1::jsonb)->>'executionId',

options.queryReplacement: ={{ JSON.stringify({ traceId: $json.traceId, workflowName: $json.workflowName, executionId: $json.executionId, failedNode: $json.failedNode, fingerprint: $json.fingerprint, burstSuppressedCount: $json.burstSuppressedCount, category: $json.category }) }}

parameters.query:
WITH current AS (
  SELECT status, error_count, opened_at, last_error_at
  FROM circuit_state
  WHERE circuit_key = 'supervisor'
  FOR UPDATE
),
upserted AS (
  INSERT INTO circuit_state (circuit_key, status, error_count, last_error_at, updated_at)
  VALUES ('supervisor', 'closed', 1, NOW(), NOW())
  ON CONFLICT (circuit_key) DO UPDATE SET
    error_count = CASE
      WHEN circuit_state.status = 'closed'
        AND circuit_state.last_error_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes'
        THEN 1
      WHEN circuit_state.status = 'closed'
        THEN circuit_state.error_count + 1
      WHEN circuit_state.status = 'half_open'
        THEN circuit_state.error_count + 1
      ELSE circuit_state.error_count
    END,
    status = CASE
      WHEN circuit_state.status = 'closed'
        AND (CASE WHEN circuit_state.last_error_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes' THEN 1 ELSE circuit_state.error_count + 1 END) >= 5
        THEN 'open'
      WHEN circuit_state.status = 'half_open'
        THEN 'open'
      ELSE circuit_state.status
    END,
    opened_at = CASE
      WHEN circuit_state.status = 'closed'
        AND (CASE WHEN circuit_state.last_error_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes' THEN 1 ELSE circuit_state.error_count + 1 END) >= 5
        THEN NOW()
      WHEN circuit_state.status = 'half_open'
        THEN NOW()
      ELSE circuit_state.opened_at
    END,
    last_error_at = NOW(),
    updated_at = NOW()
  RETURNING *
),
transition_log AS (
  INSERT INTO supervisor_events (trace_id, event_type, workflow_name, execution_id, severity, status, fingerprint, payload)
  SELECT
    ($1::jsonb)->>'traceId',
    'circuit_transition',
    ($1::jsonb)->>'workflowName',
    ($1::jsonb)->>'executionId',
    'warning',
    u.status,
    ($1::jsonb)->>'fingerprint',
    jsonb_build_object(
      'from', c.status,
      'to', u.status,
      'error_count', u.error_count,
      'workflow_name', ($1::jsonb)->>'workflowName',
      'workflow_id', ($1::jsonb)->>'workflowId',
      'failed_node', ($1::jsonb)->>'failedNode',
      'fingerprint', ($1::jsonb)->>'fingerprint',
      'category', ($1::jsonb)->>'category'
    )
  FROM upserted u
  JOIN current c ON TRUE
  WHERE c.status IS NOT NULL AND u.status <> c.status
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT
  u.status,
  u.error_count,
  u.opened_at,
  c.status AS previous_status,
  c.last_error_at AS previous_last_error_at,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM transition_log) AS transition_logged
FROM upserted u
LEFT JOIN current c ON TRUE

options.queryReplacement: ={{ JSON.stringify({ traceId: $json.traceId, workflowName: $json.workflowName, executionId: $json.executionId, fingerprint: $json.fingerprint, workflowId: $json.workflowId, failedNode: $json.failedNode, category: $json.category }) }}

options.queryReplacement: ={{ JSON.stringify({ traceId: $('Should Auto-Retry?').first().json.traceId, workflowName: $('Should Auto-Retry?').first().json.workflowName, executionId: $('Should Auto-Retry?').first().json.executionId, fingerprint: $('Should Auto-Retry?').first().json.fingerprint, status: $json.error ? 'retry_submit_failed' : 'retry_submitted', retryAttempt: $('Should Auto-Retry?').first().json.retryAttempt, retryLimit: $('Should Auto-Retry?').first().json.retryLimit, retryDelaySeconds: $('Should Auto-Retry?').first().json.retryDelaySeconds, category: $('Should Auto-Retry?').first().json.category, autoRetryReason: $('Should Auto-Retry?').first().json.autoRetryReason, httpError: $json.error ? ($json.error.message || 'retry API call failed') : '' }) }}

parameters.content:
## 🛡️ Supervisor Core V1 Lean (Round 11 Build)
**Error Trigger → Enrich/Classify → Self-Loop (throttled) → Debounce → Circuit → Alert → Auto-Retry**

**17 executable nodes. Round 11: +5 bug fixes, +4 novel features, +3 improvements.**

- Self-loop detection absorbed into Enrich & Classify
- Self-loop Telegram throttle (15-min per fingerprint via staticData)
- Normalized fingerprints (UUIDs, IPs, URLs, timestamps stripped)
- Fingerprint novelty markers (🆕 NEW / 🔄 RECURRING)
- Compact fingerprint label (fp:XXXXXXXXXX) in alert header
- Trigger-node error payload fallback
- Severity + 7-category classification with probable cause advice
- Credential sanitization + entity-safe truncation (truncate raw, then escape)
- Tag-safe clampTelegramHtml with stack-based tag closer
- Circuit breaker with 15-minute rolling decay (burst detector, not accumulator)
- Circuit decay countdown in alerts (using previous_last_error_at)
- Embedded transition logging in atomic parameterized CTE
- Unified alert: circuit-open banner merged into normal alert path
- Severity-adapted formatting with taxonomy labels + novelty prefix
- Compact HTML links via tgLink() helper + disabled web page previews
- Critical/circuit-open alerts buzz phone; others silent
- DB logging parallel to Telegram (delivery-independent)
- Auto-retry with retryOf guard + NEVER_RETRY denylist + exponential backoff
- Retry receipt logged via cross-node reference (success AND failure)
- All INSERTs use single-JSON-parameter pattern (immune to comma-split)
- No write-only cache node (removed — dead data)
